race.comment: CONCORDIA WIND (11) has produced a couple of eye-catching runs this prep, the latest over 1400m at Kensington track when she came from last on the bend to be beaten just 0.6 lengths. Drops 4 kg after Grima's claim. Watch for her to be finishing over the top of them in the dying stages. DANCES WITH HOOVES (9) had no luck at all when just outside the placings over the Randwick 1600m last start. Drawn awkwardly but with a bit of cover she can figure in the finish at very juicy odds. DEAL N' DASH (10) is back after a 172-day spell. Showed ability when last in work including a close third over today's distance in Saturday company. Capable of mixing it with these despite the gap between runs. TRAPALANDA (4) is first-up after a four-month absence. Comes to hand quickly and a recent Randwick trial win suggests he is up for this. TANGLEWOOD JIMMY (14) is going great guns on the provincial circuit and should measure up here.
